Appearances:
Plaintiff The Warrior Rooster, LLC is present. Represented by Jackson La.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dorothy Fay Richards is present.
Attorney Alex Trimble representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Douglass, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 514, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JUL-09-2012 is vacated.
